content:
3timeslazy/nix-search-tv is a very nice CLI-based tool for searching nixpkgs, nixos-options, home-manager options, and more.

I’ve grabbed their nixpkgs.sh script — if anyone wants to try it:

nix run github:niksingh710/nsearch#nsearch-adv
@Nikhil Singh Create a small video demo (<1 min), and we'll post it to https://x.com/nixos_asia
